name: create_debug_port
full_help:
create_debug_port

Description: 
Create a new debug port

Syntax: 
create_debug_port  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name> <type>

Returns: 
new debug_port object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of the debug core instance
  <type>      Type of the new debug port

Categories: 
Debug, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
